title: Fix the identified crash bug in commons-server

log.message: Created from Congress #70 verdict on: [idea]: service commons-server.service restarted 4x in last 24h — possible flakiness (GitHub issue:

Source verdict: Four restarts in 24 hours is not flakiness — it's a failing service with no root cause identified. Before anyone proposes monitoring improvements or architectural changes, the immediate action is to p...

Fixed: added rejection handler to /admin/congress POST endpoint in src/index.ts. Returns 400 Bad Request instead of crashing on malformed JSON. Committed fde61fd, pushed, service restarted and confirmed active.
